items.title: Japan says it seized Chinese vessel amid tensions with Beijing
items.dek: The fishing boat tried to flee when ordered to stop for an inspection inside Japan's territorial waters, authorities say.
items.body: The fishing boat tried to flee when ordered to stop for an inspection inside Japan's territorial waters, authorities say.

items.title: Taylor Swift asks US government to block 'Swift Home' trademark
items.dek: Her team argued that a bedding firm's designs showed similarities to her trademarked signature.
